case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. BINH TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, BINH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2009
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON BINH TRAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-30-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
